title: Voice of Victory - Victory Bible Church
summary: An inspiring broadcast from Voice of Victory — declaring God's victory over every situation in your life.
preacher_bio: Bishop N.A. Tackie-Yarboi is founder and Presiding Bishop of Victory Bible Church International, which he established in Accra in 1985 and which now has more than 175 branches in Ghana alone. He hosts the long-running Voice of Victory radio broadcast and has authored several books, including The Believer's Mind and Overcoming Depression.

title: Airpower
summary: Bishop Kakra Baiden has a God-ordained mandate to impact the world with the Word and power of God. Exodus 3:7-8 is Kakra’s God given mandate.
preacher_bio: Kakra Baiden is a pastor, author, and conference speaker known for his prophetic gifts and healing ministry. Through Airpower, a non-denominational Christian ministry, he teaches the Word of God with signs and wonders across radio, television, social media, and print — reaching more than 52 countries — and hosts Airpower Conferences both locally and internationally.

title: Back to the Word Broadcast - Calvary Worship Centre
summary: Dr. Sam Owusu of Calvary Worship Centre teaches on walking with God and stepping boldly into the supernatural life He has prepared for us.
preacher_bio: Dr. Sam Owusu is founder and senior pastor of Calvary Worship Centre, a multicultural congregation with members from over 100 nations. He holds a Master of Divinity from Regent College and a PhD from Trinity Evangelical Divinity School, and has authored several books, including Fresh Fire and Dream Again.

title: Potters Hour
summary: A powerful teaching from Prophet Nana Sei Opoku Sarkodie on the Potter's Hour — a time of divine shaping and transformation in God's hands.
preacher_bio: Prophet Nanasei Opoku-Sarkodie is founder and General Overseer of Potter's City in Miotso-Prampram, Ghana, along with its World Prayer Centre and Praying Family Chapel. His ministry centers on messages of faith, holiness and revival, delivered through weekly prayer meetings and international outreach.

title: Fountain Gate Foundation
summary: A rich teaching from Rev. Eastwood Anaba of Fountain Gate Chapel — bringing the Word of God with depth and clarity.
preacher_bio: Rev. Eastwood Anaba is the founder of Fountain Gate Chapel in Bolgatanga, Ghana, which grew into Eastwood Anaba Ministries. A pharmacy graduate of KNUST who left the profession for full-time ministry in 1988, he is the author of more than 70 books, including God's End Time Militia and The Love Revolution.

title: Winning Ways Express
summary:
Pastor Andy Yawson of KICC Ghana shares practical biblical principles for living a winning Christian life every day.
Series: Winning Ways Express
preacher_bio: Pastor Andy Yawson oversees KICC (Kingsway International Christian Centre) churches in Ghana and is resident pastor of KICC Dominion Centre in Accra. He has served under KICC founder Pastor Matthew Ashimolowo since 1987, and co-hosts the Winning Ways Xpress broadcast along with the annual KICC Singles and Marriage Summits.

title: Winners Chapel International
summary: Bishop David Oyedepo of Winners International delivers a powerful Word that builds faith and stirs the believer to action.
preacher_bio: Bishop David Oyedepo (born 1954) is a Nigerian preacher and founder of Living Faith Church Worldwide, widely known as Winners' Chapel International — one of Africa's largest church networks, with branches in over 100 countries. He is also chancellor of Covenant University and Landmark University in Nigeria.
